name: Muspelheim Weather
description: The suffocating heat of the fire realm.

results.text: Ash Storm: Visibility zero. Disadvantage on Swift. Test Fortitude DR12 each hour or take d4 damage.
Molten Rain: Fiery debris. Test Swift DR14 or suffer d6 damage.
Blistering Mirage: Intense heat wave. Shifting surreal visions.
Red Lightning Storm: Random strikes. Test Swift DR12 or take d6 damage.
Volcanic Tremors: Terrain shifts. Test Swift DR12 or fall into lava crevasses.
Cleansing Ember Winds: Burning impurities. +2 to Fortitude Tests tomorrow.
